repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.cryptography: AES-GCM authenticated encryption, Argon2 password hashing, HKDF key derivation, Ed25519 signatures, nonce management and constant-time comparison via libsodium
add pagination to a REST endpoint and write handler unit tests

retrieval_query: aead aes-gcm chacha20-poly1305 authenticated encryption argon2 bcrypt password hashing hkdf kdf ed25519 signature key management rotation nonce constant-time csprng tls

validation_smoke.name: code.cryptography L3 validation smoke
signals: uses a named AEAD construction with no manual MAC composition
passwords hashed with a memory-hard KDF (Argon2/scrypt/bcrypt) at current parameters
all randomness sourced from a CSPRNG, never a PRNG
nonces are unique per key (counter or random of sufficient width)
secret comparisons use a constant-time function

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.cryptography diagnosis smoke
signals: ECB mode or unauthenticated CBC used for encryption
a nonce/IV reused across two messages under the same key
MD5/SHA-1 or a fast unsalted hash used for passwords
a hand-rolled cipher or custom MAC composition
secret compared with a short-circuiting equality operator (timing leak)
